Independence Day: Resurgence (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $103,144,286Details
International Box Office $281,025,138
Worldwide Box Office $384,169,424
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,193,884
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $20,660,280
Total $30,854,164
Further financial details...

Synopsis

We always knew they were coming back. Using recovered alien technology, the nations of Earth have collaborated on an immense defense program to protect the planet. But nothing can prepare us for the aliens’ advanced and unprecedented force. Only the ingenuity of a few brave men and women can bring our world back from the brink of extinction.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$41,039,944 (39.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:26.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$165,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,068 opening theaters/4,091 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $142,613,372

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 24th, 2016 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: June 22nd, 2016 (Wide) (South Korea)
June 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
June 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (China)
June 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (Slovakia)
June 24th, 2016 (Wide), released as Kurtuluş Günü: Yeni Tehdit (Turkey)
Video Release: September 27th, 2016 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of sci-fi action and destruction, and for some language.
(Rating bulletin 2428 (Cert #50311), 6/8/2016)
Running Time: 119 minutes
Franchise: Independence Day
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel, Sequel With Lead Character Recast, Sequels Without Their Original Stars, Visual Effects
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Social setting: Alien Invasion
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
